sentence_2.en: The dog likes to chew bones
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Zhè zhǐ gǒu xǐhuān kěn gǔtou.

sentence_2.pl: Kot lubi chować się w tekturowym pudełku
sentence_2.en: The cat likes to hide in a cardboard box
sentence_2.zh_char: 这只猫喜欢躲在纸箱里。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Zhè zhǐ māo xǐhuān duǒ zài zhǐxiāng lǐ.

sentence_2.en: The pig has a curly tail
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Zhū yǒu yī tiáo juǎnjuǎn de wěiba.

sentence_2.en: The sheep has fluffy fur
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Yáng yǒu péngsōng de máo.

sentence_2.en: The horse gallops very fast
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Mǎ bēnpǎo de fēicháng kuài.

sentence_2.en: The cow gives milk
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Niú huì chǎn niúnǎi.

sentence_2.en: The little bird flies high in the sky
sentence_2.zh_char: 小鸟在天空中飞得很高。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Xiǎo niǎo zài tiānkōng zhōng fēi de hěn gāo.

sentence_2.en: The rabbit has long ears
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Tùzi yǒu chángcháng de ěrduo.

sentence_2.en: The duck likes to swim in the pond
sentence_2.zh_char: 鸭子喜欢在池塘里游泳。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Yāzi xǐhuān zài chítáng lǐ yóuyǒng.

sentence_2.en: The chicken likes to peck grains
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Jī xǐhuān zhuó shí gǔlì.

sentence_2.en: The frog catches flies with its long tongue
sentence_2.zh_char: 青蛙用长长的舌头捉苍蝇。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Qīngwā yòng chángcháng de shétou zhuō cāngying.

sentence_2.en: The fish swims in the water
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Yú zài shuǐ lǐ yóu.

sentence_2.en: The lion has a big mane
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Shīzi yǒu yī gè dà zōngmáo.

sentence_2.en: The elephant has a long trunk
sentence_2.zh_char: 大象有一条长长的鼻子。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Dàxiàng yǒu yī tiáo chángcháng de bízi.

sentence_2.en: The zebra has black and white stripes
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Bānmǎ shēn shang yǒu hēibái tiáowén.

sentence_2.en: The bear likes to eat honey
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Xióng xǐhuān chī fēngmì.

sentence_2.en: The deer has big antlers
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Lù yǒu yī duì dà lùjiǎo.

sentence_2.pl: Tygrys cicho skrada się przez dżunglę
sentence_2.en: The tiger sneaks quietly through the jungle
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Lǎohǔ qiāoqiāo de chuānguò cónglín.

sentence_2.en: The panda likes to nap
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Xióngmāo xǐhuān dǎ kēshuì.

sentence_2.en: The monkey likes to eat bananas
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Hóuzi xǐhuān chī xiāngjiāo.

sentence_2.en: The owl likes to fly at night
sentence_2.zh_char: 猫头鹰喜欢在夜里飞行。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Māotóuyīng xǐhuān zài yèlǐ fēixíng.

sentence_2.en: The giraffe has a long neck
sentence_2.zh_char: 长颈鹿有一条长长的脖子。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Chángjǐnglù yǒu yī tiáo chángcháng de bózi.

sentence_2.en: The butterfly has colorful wings
sentence_2.zh_char: 蝴蝶有色彩斑斓的翅膀。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Húdié yǒu sècǎi bānlán de chìbǎng.

sentence_2.en: The dragonfly flies quickly over the water
sentence_2.zh_char: 蜻蜓在水面上快速飞行。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Qīngtíng zài shuǐmiàn shàng kuàisù fēixíng.

sentence_2.en: The stork looks for frogs in the field
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Guàn zài tiányě lǐ xúnzhǎo qīngwā.

sentence_2.en: The bee collects nectar from flowers
sentence_2.zh_char: 蜜蜂从花朵中采集花蜜。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Mìfēng cóng huāduǒ zhōng cǎijí huāmì.

sentence_2.en: The flower smells beautiful
sentence_2.zh_char: 花儿散发出美丽的香气。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Huāér sànfā chū měilì de xiāngqì.

sentence_2.en: The grass is green
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Cǎo shì lǜsè de.

sentence_2.en: The leaf decorates the tree branches
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Yèzi zhuāngshì zhe shùzhī.

sentence_2.pl: Drzewo daje cień w upalny dzień
sentence_2.en: The tree gives shade on a hot day
sentence_2.zh_char: 树在炎热的日子里提供阴凉。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Shù zài yánrè de rìzi lǐ tígōng yīnliáng.

sentence_2.pl: Las jest domem dla wielu zwierząt
sentence_2.en: The forest is home to many animals
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Sēnlín shì xǔduō dòngwù de jiā.

sentence_2.pl: Łąka kwiatowa pełna jest kolorowych kwiatów
sentence_2.en: The flower meadow is full of colorful flowers
sentence_2.zh_char: 花田里开满了五颜六色的花。
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Huātián lǐ kāi mǎn le wǔyánliùsè de huā.

sentence_2.en: The river carries water to the sea
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Héliú bǎ shuǐ dài dào dàhǎi.

sentence_2.en: The pond is full of fish
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Chítáng lǐ mǎn shì yú.

sentence_2.en: The sea has salty water
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Dàhǎi de shuǐ shì xián de.

sentence_2.en: The desert has tall dunes
sentence_2.zh_pinyin: Shāmò lǐ yǒu gāogāo de shāqiū.
